title: The Man Who Had Everything
writer: Ben Ames Williams, Arthur F. Statter
actors: Jack Pickford, Lionel Belmore, Priscilla Bonner
plot: Harry Bullway is a careless young man, always after a good time. He nearly runs over a blind beggar with his car, but he shows no remorse. In response to his heartlessness, the beggar curses him, saying, "May you always have every...
